title: erysimum aurantiacum var. amurense
intro: Erysimum aurantiacum var. amurense, also known as Amur wallflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which are known to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Erysimum aurantiacum var. amurense include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
